_note: Warframe enemy data for Discord bot. 79 entries total: Grineer (standard + bosses), Corpus (standard + bosses), Infested (standard + bosses), Corrupted (standard + boss), Sentient (standard + Eidolon boss). Stats based on warframe.fandom.com wiki base stats. Bot balance applied to boss entries (~45% HP scale).

Ferrite.description: A dense, compressed iron-based ore found throughout Earth and Mercury. Ferrite is one of the most common crafting materials in the Origin System — the backbone of Grineer industrial manufacturing.
Ferrite.tb_use: General crafting material. Accumulated from Grineer drop tables. Used in future Warframe and weapon blueprint crafting.

Rubedo.description: A blood-red crystalline mineral found on Phobos, Earth, Sedna, Europa, and the Void. Rubedo's unique electromagnetic properties make it invaluable in advanced component construction.
Rubedo.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Required for intermediate and advanced weapon/Warframe blueprints. Rarer than Ferrite — stockpile carefully.

Neurodes.description: Rare biological nodes recovered from Infested-contaminated organisms. Neurodes contain dense neural tissue that interfaces with Orokin-era technology — indispensable for high-tier crafting.
Neurodes.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Essential for Warframe Neuroptics and high-level weapon components. Extremely valuable — do not sell.

Detonite Ampule.description: Pressurized containers of Grineer-manufactured explosive compound. Originally used in Grineer demolition charges and missile warheads, these ampules are repurposed by the Tenno for component synthesis.
Detonite Ampule.source: Grineer enemies, Grineer Caches, Invasion rewards
Detonite Ampule.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Used in Grineer-tier weapon blueprints and some Warframe components. Keep a reserve for future crafting.

Endo.description: Concentrated Orokin bio-matter used exclusively to rank up Mods. Endo is extracted from enemy neural pathways and combat data crystals. There is no substitute for Endo in the Mod leveling process.
Endo.source: Universal drop — enemies, missions, Transmutation, Arbitrations
Endo.tb_use: Used to rank up Mods from 0 to their maximum rank. Higher mod ranks require exponentially more Endo. A mod at rank 10 costs 8,145 total Endo to fully upgrade.

Alloy Plate.description: Dense sheets of compressed Grineer alloy, harvested from manufacturing facilities across Venus, Jupiter, and Sedna. One of the most common structural materials in the Origin System.
Alloy Plate.source: Venus, Jupiter, Sedna, Ceres, Phobos, Pluto
Alloy Plate.tb_use: Common crafting material. Used in a wide range of Warframe and weapon blueprints. Farm freely — you will always need more.

Salvage.description: Scavenged scrap metal and mechanical components recovered from Grineer and Corpus wreckage. Salvage is abundant on Mars and Jupiter, where battlefield detritus is plentiful.
Salvage.tb_use: Common crafting material. Required in large quantities for many weapon blueprints. Stockpile from Grineer-heavy missions.

Polymer Bundle.description: Flexible synthetic polymer filaments produced by Corpus manufacturing plants on Venus and Uranus. Used in insulation, circuitry housings, and structural reinforcement.
Polymer Bundle.tb_use: Common crafting material. Used extensively in Warframe components and most primary weapons. Farm on Venus or Mercury.

Circuits.description: Integrated circuit boards salvaged from Corpus electronics and Grineer communication arrays. Found in abundance on Venus and Ceres.
Circuits.tb_use: Common crafting material. Required for Saryn, Banshee, Valkyr components and several weapons. Farm on Venus.

Nano Spores.description: Microscopic Infested spores shed by Infested organisms on Saturn, Neptune, and Eris. Despite their biological origin they are widely used as a binding agent in Tenno manufacturing.
Nano Spores.tb_use: Common crafting material. Required for Paris, Furax, Ignis, Kronen, and Hydroid components. Farm on Saturn.

Plastids.description: Organic polymer secreted by Infested organisms and harvested for use as a flexible building material. Found on Saturn, Phobos, Pluto, and Eris.
Plastids.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Used in nearly every Warframe Systems blueprint and many weapons. Prioritise farming.

Oxium.description: Ultra-light structural compound produced by Corpus Oxium Osprey drones. Notoriously difficult to farm — Ospreys must be killed before they self-destruct.
Oxium.source: Corpus Oxium Ospreys (Europa, Io, Outer Terminus)
Oxium.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Required for certain Corpus-themed blueprints. Kill Ospreys quickly to prevent destruction.

Neural Sensors.description: Exotic neural interface components recovered from Corpus Sapping Ospreys and high-value targets on Jupiter. These densely packed micro-processors bridge organic and synthetic intelligence.
Neural Sensors.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Used in Warframe Neuroptics across most frames and in Tipedo. Do not sell — always in demand.

Control Module.description: Advanced Orokin-era control hardware recovered from Void caches and high-level Corpus units on Neptune. These modules manage the complex feedback systems inside Warframe suits.
Control Module.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Required for Warframe Systems blueprints. Farm Neptune missions or Void Exterminate.

Morphics.description: Malleable Orokin-era material that shifts between solid and semi-liquid states under electromagnetic stress. Found throughout Mercury, Mars, Europa, and Pluto.
Morphics.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Required in nearly every Warframe Chassis blueprint and many weapon recipes. Farm Mercury or Mars.

Orokin Cell.description: Ancient Orokin power cells containing a near-inexhaustible energy source. Recovered from Orokin Derelicts, Orokin Towers, and powerful bosses across the Origin System.
Orokin Cell.source: Saturn (Tethys), Ceres (Seimeni), Orokin Derelicts, Boss drops
Orokin Cell.tb_use: Legendary crafting material. Required to assemble every Warframe main blueprint. Critically important — never sell. Farm Saturn or Ceres.

Gallium.description: A rare metallic element with an extremely low melting point. Gallium pools in cavities of Grineer-occupied terrain on Mars and Uranus, where it is harvested for its heat-transfer properties.
Gallium.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Required for Rhino (main blueprint), Oberon, Hydroid Systems, Fragor, Galatine, and Akstiletto. Farm Mars.

Argon Crystal.description: A crystalline energy matrix found only within Orokin Void fissures. Argon Crystals decay at a rate of 50% per day — use them immediately after acquisition.
Argon Crystal.tb_use: Legendary crafting material. Required for Hydroid Neuroptics/Chassis, Kronen, and Atterax. DECAYS — only farm when you are ready to craft.

Detonite Injector.description: A pressurised injector loaded with refined Detonite compound. Produced by processing raw Detonite Ampules in the Foundry. Essential for Grineer-tier incendiary weapons.
Detonite Injector.source: Craft from Detonite Ampules ×10 + Ferrite×400 + Plastids×150 + Polymer Bundle×500
Detonite Injector.tb_use: Rare craftable component. Required ×2 for Ignis. Must be crafted in the Foundry before use — cannot be farmed directly.

Forma.description: A powerful Orokin catalyst that restructures a weapon or Warframe's polarities, allowing more mod capacity. Forma blueprints drop from Void missions and Nightwave rewards.
Forma.source: Void missions, Nightwave rewards, Sortie rewards
Forma.tb_use: Legendary craftable component. Required for Ignis, Buzlok, Opticor, and Akstiletto. Very rare — only craft these weapons when you have Forma to spare.

Cryotic.description: A deep-frozen crystalline mineral mined exclusively through Excavation missions. Cryotic is harvested from Excavators as they drill into subterranean ice formations — the colder the planet, the richer the yield.
Cryotic.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Required for Tonkor, Atlas Chassis, and Ivara Chassis. Farm Excavation missions.

Fieldron Sample.description: Unstable energy capsules recovered from Corpus laboratories and Invasion caches. Each sample contains a fragment of a Corpus energy field matrix — ten must be stabilised to produce a usable Fieldron.
Fieldron Sample.source: Corpus Invasion rewards, Corpus Caches, Orokin Derelict
Fieldron Sample.tb_use: Uncommon crafting material. Combine 10 Fieldron Samples in the Foundry to produce one Fieldron — required for Opticor.

Fieldron.description: A refined Corpus energy matrix produced from ten Fieldron Samples. Used as a component in advanced Corpus-derived Energy Lab weapons. Cannot be purchased — must be crafted in the Foundry.
Fieldron.source: Craft from Fieldron Sample×10 + Control Module×1 + Salvage×500 + Plastids×250
Fieldron.tb_use: Rare craftable component. Required ×5 for Opticor. Plan ahead — each Fieldron takes 12 hours to build.

Nitain Extract.description: A volatile refined compound extracted from Grineer chemical silos. Originally secured behind high-level Alert missions, Nitain Extract is now primarily obtained through Nightwave Cred purchases.
Nitain Extract.source: Nightwave Cred Offerings, Reactor Sabotage (Grineer), Ghoul Purge bounties
Nitain Extract.tb_use: Legendary crafting material. Required for Ivara Chassis (×4) and Ivara Systems (×5). Extremely limited supply — treat every unit as precious.

Tellurium.description: An extremely rare metalloid found only in the anomalous physics of Archwing combat zones and aquatic Uranus missions. Tellurium decays rapidly once separated from its host environment.
Tellurium.tb_use: Rare crafting material. Required for advanced Archwing and Amp components. Very scarce — farm Archwing Exterminate on Uranus.

Sand Yellow Pigment.description: A fine ochre pigment extracted from Grineer desert-pattern camo compounds. Tenno colourists prize this hue for replicating the dusty tones of Phobos and Mars surface units.
Sand Yellow Pigment.tb_use: Cosmetic material. Used in Colour Pack crafting at the Orbiter. Accumulate pigments to unlock new palette entries for your Warframe and weapons.

abilities.name: Grakata Burst
abilities.description: Unleashes a tight burst from his Grakata — reliable, consistent damage.

abilities.name: Suppressive Fire
abilities.description: Sustained raking fire that can stagger and knock the target to the ground.

abilities.name: Cleave
abilities.description: A brutal horizontal chop with his Cleaver — guaranteed Slash proc.

abilities.name: Overhead Smash
abilities.description: A two-handed overhead blow. Heavy damage; good chance of Knockdown.

abilities.name: Shotgun Blast
abilities.description: Close-range shotgun attack — high Impact damage.

abilities.name: Grapple Hook
abilities.description: Launches a hook that pulls the target in and deals Slash damage.

frontier_lancer.name: Frontier Lancer
frontier_lancer._wiki: Frontier Lancer — Earth, Grineer Forest tileset. HP=100, Armor=100 (Alloy Armor). Equips Grakata (NOT Karak — Karak is the Elite Frontier Lancer). Sheev dagger as backup. Source: warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Lancer/Frontier_Lancer

abilities.name: Grakata Burst
abilities.description: Rapid Grakata fire — moderate Impact damage per burst.

abilities.name: Suppressive Volley
abilities.description: Sustained Grakata fire that staggers and knocks the target down.

frontier_trooper.name: Frontier Trooper
frontier_trooper._wiki: Frontier Grineer Trooper — Earth variant. HP=150, Armor=150. Equips Sobek automatic shotgun (8 pellets per shot, high spread). Close-quarters specialist. Can knock enemies down with shotgun blast.

abilities.name: Sobek Blast
abilities.description: Close-range Sobek shotgun blast — heavy Impact damage at close quarters.

abilities.name: Point-Blank Volley
abilities.description: Empties both barrels at point-blank range. High damage, good knockdown chance.

frontier_heavy_gunner.name: Frontier Heavy Gunner
frontier_heavy_gunner._wiki: Frontier Heavy Gunner — Earth, Grineer Forest tileset. HP=350, Armor=500, base_level=1, Affinity=500. Equips Gorgon minigun. Deals mostly Slash damage. Radial knockdown when player is too close. Source: wiki.warframe.com/w/Heavy_Gunner

abilities.name: Gorgon Minigun
abilities.description: Sustained Gorgon minigun fire — relentless Impact damage that eats through shields.

abilities.name: Charged Burst
abilities.description: Winds up for a devastating concentrated burst. High damage and knockdown.

abilities.name: Armor Lock
abilities.description: Activates battle-armor protocol — restores shields when critically low.

grineer_warden.name: Grineer Warden
grineer_warden._wiki: Grineer Warden — found in Rescue missions on Earth (Mariana node in Vor's Prize). HP=600, Armor=500 per wiki; scaled to 400/400 for bot balance. Heavy melee enforcer carrying Heliocor mace and Grakata. Guards hostages in prison blocks.

abilities.name: Heliocor Strike
abilities.description: Brutal mace swing with the Heliocor — heavy Impact damage and knockdown chance.

abilities.name: Grakata Burst
abilities.description: Backup Grakata fire when at range — steady Impact damage.

abilities.name: Warden Protocol
abilities.description: Activates hardened riot-armor reserves when critically damaged.

captain_vor.name: Captain Vor
captain_vor._wiki: Captain Vor — Grineer boss, Vor's Prize final encounter at Cambria, Earth. Wiki stats: HP=1994, Shields=1742, Armor=308 (spawn level 10). Scaled to HP=800/Shields=600/Armor=300 for bot balance. Weapons: Seer pistol, Janus Key (Void beam), Cronus sword. Abilities: Sphere Shield (invulnerability + reinforcements at 75%/50%/25% HP), Nervos Mine (stun), Teleport.

abilities.name: Seer Shot
abilities.description: Precise shot from Vor's custom Seer pistol — reliable Impact damage.

abilities.name: Janus Key Beam
abilities.description: A beam of concentrated Void energy from the Janus Key — Radiation damage causes confusion.

abilities.name: Nervos Mine
abilities.description: Vor hurls an electrified Nervos grenade — Electricity damage and knockdown.

abilities.name: Cronus Strike
abilities.description: Vor closes the gap with his Cronus sword — Slash damage with a bleed proc.

grineer_heavy_gunner.name: Grineer Heavy Gunner
grineer_heavy_gunner._wiki: Grineer Heavy Gunner — Ceres, Saturn, Sedna. HP=400, Armor=350. Equips Gorgon. Heavy, slow, devastating suppressive fire. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Heavy_Gunner

abilities.name: Gorgon Suppression
abilities.description: Unloads her Gorgon minigun in a sustained arc of heavy Impact rounds.

abilities.name: Sustained Barrage
abilities.description: Relentless hail of Gorgon fire that staggers and knocks the target down.

abilities.name: Charged Slam
abilities.description: Brings her arm cannon down in a ground-pound that staggers anything nearby.

grineer_bombard.name: Grineer Bombard
grineer_bombard._wiki: Grineer Bombard — Mercury, Ceres, Sedna. HP=300, Armor=225. Equips Ogris rocket launcher. Fires Homing Missiles with Blast proc. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Bombard

abilities.name: Ogris Rocket
abilities.description: Fires a tracking Ogris rocket that detonates on impact with Blast damage and knockdown.

abilities.name: Salvo Fire
abilities.description: Launches two rockets in rapid succession — spread Blast damage across the area.

grineer_trooper.name: Grineer Trooper
grineer_trooper._wiki: Grineer Trooper — Earth, Mercury, Ceres. HP=200, Armor=200. Equips Sobek auto-shotgun. Close-quarters variant. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Trooper

abilities.name: Sobek Blast
abilities.description: Close-range Sobek burst — wide spread and high Impact at short distance.

abilities.name: Point-Blank
abilities.description: Unloads both barrels at point blank, devastating impact and knockdown chance.

grineer_napalm.name: Grineer Napalm
grineer_napalm._wiki: Grineer Napalm — Ceres, Sedna, Phobos. HP=600, Armor=350. Equips Ignis flamethrower. Deals persistent Heat procs and sets lingering fire on the ground. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Napalm

abilities.name: Ignis Stream
abilities.description: Sustained Ignis flamethrower stream — relentless Heat damage with guaranteed burn proc.

abilities.name: Napalm Blast
abilities.description: Launches an incendiary canister that explodes on contact, igniting the area.

grineer_shield_lancer.name: Grineer Shield Lancer
grineer_shield_lancer._wiki: Grineer Shield Lancer — Earth, Mercury, Ceres. HP=200, Shields=400 (proto shield), Armor=100. Carries ballistic shield and Sheev dagger. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Shield_Lancer

abilities.name: Shield Bash
abilities.description: Slams his ballistic shield forward — high Impact and near-certain knockdown.

abilities.name: Sheev Slash
abilities.description: Quick Sheev dagger swipe around the shield's edge — guaranteed Slash proc.

abilities.name: Shield Charge
abilities.description: Charges forward with shield raised, barrelling through the target.

grineer_ballista.name: Grineer Ballista
grineer_ballista._wiki: Grineer Ballista — Earth, Mercury, Mars. HP=150, Armor=100. Female Grineer sniper with Vulkar rifle. Precision long-range attacker. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Ballista

abilities.name: Vulkar Shot
abilities.description: Precision Vulkar sniper round — high Puncture, unforgiving at range.

abilities.name: Charged Shot
abilities.description: Fully charged Vulkar bolt that staggers the target on impact.

grineer_seeker.name: Grineer Seeker
grineer_seeker._wiki: Grineer Seeker — Earth, Mercury, Ceres. HP=150, Armor=100. Equips Latron and deploys Latchers (proximity mines). warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Seeker

abilities.name: Latron Burst
abilities.description: Three-round Latron burst — moderate Impact per shot.

abilities.name: Deploy Latcher
abilities.description: Tosses a Latcher proximity mine that detonates with Electricity on contact.

grineer_eviscerator.name: Grineer Eviscerator
grineer_eviscerator._wiki: Grineer Eviscerator — Mars, Phobos, Sedna. HP=350, Armor=300. Equips a wrist-mounted Ripsaw launcher that fires saw blades. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Eviscerator

abilities.name: Ripsaw Disc
abilities.description: Fires a spinning Ripsaw disc — guaranteed Slash proc and deep bleed wound.

abilities.name: Disc Volley
abilities.description: Launches three discs in quick succession, each with a Slash proc.

grineer_hellion.name: Grineer Hellion
grineer_hellion._wiki: Grineer Hellion — Earth, Mars, Ceres. HP=150, Armor=100. Jetpack-equipped unit firing Ogris rockets. Highly mobile aerial attacker. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Hellion

abilities.name: Ogris Missile
abilities.description: Launches a homing Ogris rocket from its jetpack launcher — Blast damage and knockdown.

abilities.name: Dive Bomb
abilities.description: Powers into a diving aerial ram using its jetpack — high Impact and stagger.

grineer_commander.name: Grineer Commander
grineer_commander._wiki: Grineer Commander — high-level Grineer missions. HP=500, Armor=300. Officers capable of swap/teleport attacks and Karak elite fire. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Commander_(Grineer)

abilities.name: Karak Fire
abilities.description: Precision Karak carbine burst — consistent Impact from an elite Grineer officer.

abilities.name: Tactical Swap
abilities.description: Teleports behind the target and delivers a surprise strike, catching them off guard.

abilities.name: Command Aura
abilities.description: Rallies remaining forces — restores a surge of hit points.

grineer_hyekka_master.name: Grineer Hyekka Master
grineer_hyekka_master._wiki: Grineer Hyekka Master — Earth, Ceres. HP=400, Armor=200. Commands Hyekka cats; equips Ignis flamethrower. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Hyekka_Master

abilities.name: Ignis Sweep
abilities.description: Sweeps the area with her Ignis — Heat damage with a guaranteed burn proc.

abilities.name: Command Hyekkas
abilities.description: Sends her Hyekka cats to slash at the target — vicious Slash procs.

grineer_drahk_master.name: Grineer Drahk Master
grineer_drahk_master._wiki: Grineer Drahk Master — Earth, Mars. HP=300, Armor=200. Commands Drahk dogs; equips Drakgoon shotgun. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Drahk_Master

abilities.name: Drakgoon Blast
abilities.description: Fires a wide Drakgoon blast with ricochet pellets — high Impact at medium range.

abilities.name: Release Drahk
abilities.description: Sics a Drahk dog on the target — rapid biting procs Slash bleed.

grineer_roller.name: Grineer Roller
grineer_roller._wiki: Grineer Roller — Earth, Mercury, Ceres. HP=100, Armor=50. Spherical mine-like unit that rolls into enemies and delivers Impact damage. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Roller

abilities.name: Rolling Strike
abilities.description: Rolls full-speed into the target — high Impact momentum and knockdown.

abilities.name: Spin Slam
abilities.description: Spins in place and then slams forward — amplified Impact with stagger.

grineer_powerfist.name: Grineer Powerfist
grineer_powerfist._wiki: Grineer Powerfist — Ceres, Sedna. HP=500, Armor=500. Massive Grineer bruiser with hydraulic fist gauntlets. Deals crushing Impact. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Powerfist

abilities.name: Hydraulic Punch
abilities.description: Drives a hydraulic fist into the target — crushing Impact and guaranteed knockdown.

abilities.name: Ground Slam
abilities.description: Smashes the ground with both fists, sending a Blast shockwave outward.

abilities.name: Armored Advance
abilities.description: Charges forward shoulder-first, bulldozing through anything in the way.

grineer_elite_lancer.name: Grineer Elite Lancer
grineer_elite_lancer._wiki: Grineer Elite Lancer — Ceres, Mars, Sedna. HP=200, Armor=200. Upgraded Lancer with Karak carbine instead of Grakata. More accurate, harder-hitting. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Elite_Lancer

abilities.name: Karak Burst
abilities.description: Elite Karak carbine burst — more accurate and harder-hitting than the Grakata.

abilities.name: Suppressive Volley
abilities.description: Sustained Karak fire that can knock the target off their feet.

abilities.name: Plasma Grenade
abilities.description: Throws a plasma grenade with a short fuse — Blast damage and stagger.

grineer_manic.name: Grineer Manic
grineer_manic._wiki: Grineer Manic — high-level missions, Nightmare. HP=250, Armor=150. Cloaking berserker with dual Sheev daggers. Extremely fast; attacks with rapid-slash combos. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Manic

abilities.name: Manic Slash
abilities.description: A lightning-fast dual-Sheev combo — two deep Slash procs in rapid succession.

abilities.name: Blade Frenzy
abilities.description: An unrelenting series of frenzied slashes — each leaving a separate bleed proc.

abilities.name: Cloak Charge
abilities.description: Decloaks mid-sprint and slams into the target — stagger from the sudden impact.

grineer_nox.name: Grineer Nox
grineer_nox._wiki: Grineer Nox — Kuva Fortress, high-level Grineer missions. HP=2000, Armor=500. Wears an armoured containment suit; helmet weak point. Equips Glaxion. Splatters Toxin on death. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Nox

abilities.name: Glaxion Beam
abilities.description: Sustained Glaxion cryo-beam — Cold damage with a slowing Freeze proc.

abilities.name: Toxin Splash
abilities.description: Leaks toxic sludge from its suit — Toxin damage with a lingering Poison proc.

abilities.name: Helmet Burst
abilities.description: Its helmet cracks under stress, releasing a burst of concentrated corrosive toxin.

tyl_regor.name: Tyl Regor
tyl_regor._wiki: Tyl Regor — Titania, Uranus (assassination). Wiki base HP≈4000, Armor≈450 at lv35. Equips dual Ack & Brunt axes; performs acrobatic melee and toxin-spray combos. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Tyl_Regor

abilities.name: Ack & Brunt Combo
abilities.description: Leaps forward with a devastating dual-axe combo — deep Slash procs.

abilities.name: Toxin Burst
abilities.description: Slams the ground, erupting a cloud of Grineer toxin — guaranteed Poison proc.

abilities.name: Aerial Slam
abilities.description: Launches into the air and crashes down with crushing Impact and knockdown.

abilities.name: Regenerate
abilities.description: Tyl plunges into a healing tank below — resurfaces partially restored.

sargas_ruk.name: General Sargas Ruk
sargas_ruk._wiki: General Sargas Ruk — Tethys, Saturn (assassination). Wiki base HP≈6500, Armor≈400 at lv17. Giant Grineer general with massive arm cannon; weak point on back exhaust vents. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Sargas_Ruk

abilities.name: Arm Cannon Burst
abilities.description: Fires a burst from his arm-mounted incendiary cannon — Heat with guaranteed Burn.

abilities.name: Flame Pillar
abilities.description: Erupts a column of flame directly beneath the target — high Heat and blinding heat proc.

abilities.name: Ruk's Charge
abilities.description: Charges forward with his massive frame — crushing Impact and ground knockdown.

abilities.name: Vent Cooldown
abilities.description: Closes his armour vents — becomes temporarily invulnerable while venting heat.

vay_hek.name: Councilor Vay Hek
vay_hek._wiki: Councilor Vay Hek — Oro, Earth (assassination). Wiki HP≈2500, Shields≈1500, Armor≈225 at lv15. Grineer politician; transforms between Councillor and Terra Frame. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Vay_Hek

abilities.name: Councillor Beam
abilities.description: Vay Hek unleashes a concentrated Void-radiation beam from his political optics.

abilities.name: Terra Frame Stomp
abilities.description: Transforms to Terra Frame and delivers a shockwave stomp — massive knockdown.

abilities.name: Drone Swarm
abilities.description: Releases a swarm of electro-drones that shock and stagger the target.

abilities.name: Political Immunity
abilities.description: Vay Hek retreats into his armoured Councillor shell — partial HP restoration.

kela_de_thaym.name: Kela de Thaym
kela_de_thaym._wiki: Kela de Thaym — Merrow, Sedna (assassination). Wiki HP≈5000, Armor≈500 at lv35. Grineer Executioner champion; arena fighter with Ripkas and Supra. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Kela_de_Thaym

abilities.name: Supra Salvo
abilities.description: Full-auto Supra rifle salvo — enormous clip, relentless Impact fire.

abilities.name: Ripkas Slash
abilities.description: Closes in with her Ripkas claws — brutal Slash proc deep-wound.

abilities.name: Executioner Leap
abilities.description: Leaps from an arena perch directly onto the target — crushing knockdown.

abilities.name: Turret Deploy
abilities.description: Activates arena auto-turrets — a volley of Puncture rounds from multiple angles.

lech_kril.name: Lieutenant Lech Kril
lech_kril._wiki: Lieutenant Lech Kril — Axi, Mars / War, Ceres (assassination). Wiki HP≈2500, Armor≈300 at lv5. Grineer general with cryo-pack backpack; Shockwave Mallet and Ice Wave. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Lieutenant_Lech_Kril

abilities.name: Cryo-Mallet Slam
abilities.description: Slams his giant cryo-mallet — Cold damage and slowing Freeze proc.

abilities.name: Ice Wave
abilities.description: Channels his cryo-pack into a forward ice wave — powerful Cold with wide freeze.

abilities.name: Shockwave Slam
abilities.description: Detonates his cryo-pack briefly for a Blast shockwave — full knockdown.

abilities.name: Cryo Invulnerability
abilities.description: His suit overloads with cryo-fluid, temporarily blocking all damage.

hek.name: Hek
hek._wiki: Hek — Oro, Earth (assassination, early game). Wiki HP≈2000, Armor≈150 at lv12. Grineer military commander; equips his signature Hek shotgun. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Hek_(Boss)

abilities.name: Hek Blast
abilities.description: Point-blank Hek shotgun blast — enormous Impact from his namesake weapon.

abilities.name: Slug Shot
abilities.description: Fires a single devastating Hek slug — Puncture through armour with stagger.

abilities.name: Grenade Toss
abilities.description: Lobs a frag grenade that detonates at the target's feet — Blast knockdown.

corpus_crewman.name: Corpus Crewman
corpus_crewman._wiki: Corpus Crewman — Venus, Mercury, Phobos. HP=100, Shields=100. Basic Corpus infantry; equips Dera or Supra rifle. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Crewman

abilities.name: Dera Burst
abilities.description: Semi-auto Dera burst — consistent Impact from the standard Corpus sidearm.

abilities.name: Suppressive Volley
abilities.description: Sustained Dera fire that staggers the target under a hail of bolts.

corpus_prod_crewman.name: Corpus Prod Crewman
corpus_prod_crewman._wiki: Corpus Prod Crewman — Venus, Neptune. HP=150, Shields=150. Melee-focused Crewman; equips Prova electrical prod. Charges into close range. warframe.fandom.com/wiki/Prod_Crewman

abilities.name: Prova Strike
abilities.description: Swings his Prova prod — Electricity damage with reliable stagger on hit.

abilities.name: Prova Slam
abilities.description: Slams the prod down in an overhand strike — amplified Electricity and knockdown.

corpus_sniper_crewman.name: Corpus Sniper Crewman
